title: Update user profile API documentation
description: The user profile endpoint documentation needs to reflect the new fields added in v2.1. Include examples for the updated request/response schemas.

title: Fix login integration test auth mock
description: The login integration test is failing with a 401 Unauthorized error when using the auth mock. The mock appears to be sending an improperly formatted Authorization header. The token may be missing the 'Bearer' prefix or the mock is not encoding the token correctly. Investigate and update the mock configuration to match the expected header format.

title: Refactor payment service logging
description: Refactor the payment service to use structured logging with consistent level tags. This will improve debugging and monitoring for production incidents.
